title: Kavadarci, Pelagonia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kavadarci, Pelagonia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kavadarci is a city in Pelagonia with a population of 29,000. A city in central North Macedonia known as the wine capital of the country, home to the Tikveš wine region and the annual Kavadarci Wine Festival.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
